job_title: Memory Innovation Engineer, AI and Machine Learning
job_description:
• Develop forward-looking technical strategies that connect AI workload trends (training, inference, emerging models) to memory, packaging, and system level requirements.
• Strong background in computer architecture, systems design, or hardware–software codesigns, with relevance to AI, datacenter, or high performance computing.
• Principal Engineer/MTS – Member of Technical Staff, HIG-HBM Product System Engineering (Media Health Reliability)Singapore, SingaporePosted 2 months ago Engage with customers, hyperscalers, startups, and industry partners to influence requirements, validate concepts, and shape future directions.
• Experience with AI systems, including training or inference workloads, accelerators (GPU/ASIC), or performance benchmarking.
• Experience building software or analytical models for system evaluation, performance analysis, or architectural exploration.
• Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to bridge deep technical detail and strategic context.
• Demonstrated ability to analyze complex system level performance problems, especially memory, bandwidth, latency, and scaling.
• Track record of technical influence, such as patents, industry collaboration, customer engagements, or technology evangelism.
